Audit matrix

Audit recovery FAQ

Audit recovery FAQs matter when operators need direct answers about how reservation evidence and waiver records should be restored after an incident stabilizes.

The FAQ explains exception triggers, dashboard checks, and the reservation guarantees that auditors expect to see preserved during recovery.

It also links each answer back to the regional recovery playbooks used during incident review.

Related quota guides
